Cadetia lagorum, also known as the Cadetia or the Orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. The plant is said to have potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. The bioactive constituents of Cadetia lagorum include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Cadetia lagorum is used to make various herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often consumed to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
taxonomy: Cadetia lagorum is a species of orchid. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae. Within the Orchidaceae family, Cadetia lagorum is classified as a member of the tribe Epidendreae. Further classification places it in the subtribe Pleurothallidinae. The species is also known by the synonym Pleurothallis lagorum.
